expected_path_note: exclusion_check=Yes (concession where the operator invests its OWN capital; not paid with public funds) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 12 – Toll Road Concession Own Capital Philippines
activities: Luzon Expressway Partners Inc. operates a toll expressway under a 30-year concession from the Philippine national government. Under the agreement the company raised its own financing — equity and commercial project bonds — to build, operate and maintain the road, and recovers its investment exclusively through toll collections from drivers. The file notes that no state subsidies or budget payments are received; the government's role is limited to granting the concession and regulating toll tariffs.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Concession asset financed by own equity and bonds.
